cot_prefix: Okay, let's see. I need to figure out how many penguins are both less than 8 years old and weigh less than 12 kg. Let me start by going through each penguin one by one. First, there's Louis. His age is 7, which is less than 8. His weight is 11 kg, which is also less than 12. So Louis fits both conditions. That's one. Next up is Bernard. He's 5 years old, which is less than 8. His weight is 13 kg. Oh, 13 is more than 12, so Bernard doesn't meet the weight requirement. So he's out. Then there's Vincent. His age is 9, which is more than 8, so even if his weight is 11 kg, he doesn't meet the age condition. So Vincent is not counted. Lastly, Gwen is 8 years old. The question says "less than 8," so 8 isn't included. Her weight is 15 kg, which is way over 12. So Gwen doesn't fit either condition. So the only one that fits both is Louis.
